_comment: v0.3 Chunk 3 expansion. 250+ additional games across all platforms with matched reports. Every Snapdragon 8 Elite report correctly uses Adreno 830 (validated at app load).

games.title: Diablo IV
games.description: Online-only ARPG. Battle.net DRM and online requirement make Winlator iffy.

games.title: Diablo III
games.description: Battle.net required. Offline mod possible. Switch port via Eden is simpler.

games.title: Path of Exile
games.description: Online ARPG. Anticheat is permissive but high system reqs.

games.title: Path of Exile 2
games.description: Sequel. Heavier than POE1. Anticheat tolerant but Steam-only.

games.title: Torchlight III
games.description: Casual ARPG. Runs locked 60 in Winlator.

games.title: Last Epoch
games.description: Indie ARPG. Plays well in GameNative.

games.title: Tekken 7
games.description: UE4 fighter. 60fps essential — GameNative+Proton handles it.

games.title: Tekken 8
games.description: UE5 fighter. Heavy. ~40fps on SD8E with low settings.

games.title: Street Fighter 6
games.description: RE Engine fighter. Locked 60 needed for online.

games.title: Street Fighter V
games.description: UE4 fighter. Locked 60 on Winlator Cmod.

games.title: Mortal Kombat 1
games.description: UE4. Demanding for a fighter. 30-40fps SD8E.

games.title: Devil May Cry 5
games.description: RE Engine. ~45fps SD8E with low settings.

games.title: Devil May Cry HD Collection
games.description: Remasters of DMC1/2/3. DirectX 9, CPU-light — runs best with a DXVK-D3D9 wrapper + Box64 on Adreno 830 (Vortek driver). Each game (dmc1/dmc2/dmc3) launches from its own exe.
knownIssues: Cutscenes can show a black screen while audio still plays — caused by missing Visual C++ 2010/2012/2015 runtimes.
Full black screen with audio in-game usually means a DXVK version mismatch — drop to DXVK 2.3 or WineD3D.
Black screen with NO audio means the wrong GPU driver is selected — use Vortek on Adreno 830, not Turnip.
modsAndPatches: Optional env var MESA_EXTENSION_MAX_YEAR=2003 helps if the game refuses to start.

games.title: Bayonetta (PC)
games.description: PC port runs locked 60 in Winlator.

games.title: NieR Replicant (2021)
games.description: Upgrade of original NieR. Plays well in Winlator.

games.title: Hades II (Early Access)
games.description: Same engine path as Hades. Locked 60.

games.title: Balatro
games.description: Love2D engine. Has Android port — better than Winlator.

games.title: FTL: Faster Than Light
games.description: Has iPad port. Winlator runs the PC version fine.

games.title: Into the Breach
games.description: Tactical roguelike. Has Netflix mobile port.

games.title: RimWorld
games.description: Colony sim. Locked 60 in Winlator; CPU-heavy with big colonies.

games.title: Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade
games.description: UE4 Remake. EGS DRM is the hurdle. ~25fps SD8E.

games.title: Dragon Quest XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age
games.description: UE4. Locked 60 in Winlator with medium settings.

games.title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel
The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II
Helldivers 2
games.description: nProtect anticheat blocks Winlator. Don't bother.

games.title: Forza Horizon 4
games.description: Delisted; if owned, works in GameNative+Proton EAC.

games.title: Forza Horizon 5
games.description: MS Store. EAC. Doable in GameNative.

games.title: Wolfenstein: The New Order
games.description: id Tech 5. Some texture popping in Winlator.

games.title: Wolfenstein II: The New Colossus
games.description: id Tech 6, Vulkan-native. Runs astonishingly well.

games.title: Ori and the Will of the Wisps
Hollow Knight: Silksong
games.description: Team Cherry sequel. Same Unity engine.

games.title: Phasmophobia
games.description: Online co-op horror. EAC blocks online; offline works.

games.title: R.E.P.O.
games.description: Co-op physics horror. Plays in Winlator offline.

games.title: Lethal Company
games.description: Co-op scavenger horror. Modding scene huge.

games.title: Project Zomboid
games.description: Iso zombie survival. 60fps; modded servers can be heavy.

games.title: Five Nights at Freddy's: Security Breach
Like a Dragon Gaiden: The Man Who Erased His Name

reports.notes: Battle.net flaky; in-game ok when it loads.
